title: アウトドア派ウマ娘、集う！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Fall—the season for sports! It's finally here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the academy's first-ever
volunteer-run sports fest! Are you guys ready to
rumble?

text_block_list.name: Ines & Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I'm more than ready for today! I scrubbed
my kendo gear to sparkling perfection!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait... kendo? I thought this was going to be a
baseball tourney?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Baseball? I thought a multidisciplinary martial arts
wood breaking competition was being held...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, hold up. I thought we were having a
regular school sports day. You know, bread speed
eating and all...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! We forgot to settle on a sport!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This is bad! Without a plan, this whole event's
done for!
DON'T WORRY!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We can do everything! We can't let everyone's
hard work go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo... But we all brought completely different
equipment...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No problem! That just means we need to combine
everything and overcome this together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
C-combine everything?! What does that mean
we'll do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We'll hold the very first ever
baseball-kendo-martial-sports day! There, it's
settled!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh... O-okay! So the idea is to make a new sport
based on everyone's specialties!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But... how is that meant to be executed? We must
first construct a set of rules!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's just throw our ideas together! Like, you've
gotta hit a ball with the kendo sword and try to
get it in a basket...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and if we write things on the balls, we could
put a scavenger hunt into the game, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yup, teamwork will get us out of any pinch! This is
turning into a fundamental fall lesson for youthful
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm! Put like that, your suggestion seems quite
ingenious... Hmmm!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, everybody—time out! I think we need to work out a real plan from the ground up!
